emergency_definition: Sparking or burning smell from panel

emergency_routing_rules.after_hours_emergency: Attempt Ben's cell first. If no answer within 30 seconds, attempt on-call technician. If both fail, leave urgent voicemail and assure callback within 30 minutes.

non_emergency_routing_rules.during_hours: Take name and number, transfer to office line or book callback via Jobber
non_emergency_routing_rules.after_hours: Collect name, number, and issue details. Confirm next business day callback. Log in Jobber.

call_transfer_rules.on_transfer_fail: Apologize and assure callback within 1 business hour during hours, or within 30 minutes for after-hours emergencies

integration_constraints: All calls must be logged in Jobber after completion
Do not create duplicate jobs — check existing open jobs first
after_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, note office is closed, confirm if emergency. If emergency: collect name, number, and address immediately, attempt transfer to Ben then on-call tech. If non-emergency: collect details and confirm next-day callback via Jobber.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, ask purpose, collect name and callback number, attempt live transfer. If transfer fails, take message and assure 1-hour callback. Log all calls in Jobber.
questions_or_unknowns: On-call technician contact number not yet provided — needed before go-live
Exact Jobber workflow for after-hours logging not confirmed
notes: Onboarding call confirmed most key details. Ben is ready to go live once on-call technician number is provided. Transfer timeout set to 30 seconds as agreed.
